scripts.gen:api: rm -rf src/gen && mkdir -p src/gen && protoc --plugin=./node_modules/.bin/protoc-gen-es --plugin=./node_modules/.bin/protoc-gen-connect-es -I ../agent-compose/proto --es_out src/gen --es_opt target=ts,import_extension=.js --connect-es_out src/gen --connect-es_opt target=ts,import_extension=.js health/v1/health.proto agentcompose/v2/agentcompose.proto && node scripts/normalize-generated-eof.mjs src/gen
